description_long: This street food stall features a weathered wooden base with a rustic appearance, topped by a bright orange and yellow canopy that reads 'noodle exchange' in a playful, hand-painted style. The stall is equipped with a large metal pot set atop a simple stove or burner, suggesting it is used for cooking or serving hot food, likely noodles. Several green bottles and white rectangular containers are arranged on the wooden counter, possibly for condiments or ingredients. Cardboard boxes are stacked around the base, indicating storage or recent deliveries. The overall structure is supported by four metal poles, giving it a sturdy yet portable look. The design is functional and inviting, suitable for a busy urban street or market setting.
description: A rustic wooden street food stall with an orange and yellow canopy labeled 'noodle exchange', featuring a large cooking pot, condiment bottles, and surrounding cardboard boxes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the canopy signage, central cooking pot, and a few bottles on the counter.
description_view_1: View with the canopy signage, cooking pot, bottles, and visible cardboard box on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the canopy, cooking pot, and several stacked cardboard boxes at the back.
description_view_3: Back view showing the counter with two bottles, the cooking pot, and more cardboard boxes on the left.
attribute_signage: The canopy features the text 'noodle exchange' in a large, playful yellow font on an orange background, with a yellow stripe and orange scalloped trim. The signage is prominently placed on the front and sides of the canopy.
attribute_serving_counter: A wide, rectangular wooden counter spans the front of the stall, made of weathered planks, with condiment bottles and containers placed on top. No glass shield or cash register is visible.
attribute_food_display: Food appears to be presented in an open pot on the counter, with condiments and containers arranged nearby for easy access. There are no protective display cases or covers.
attribute_architectural_style: rustic street kiosk with a colorful canopy
